aboutPage.heroDesc: SakhiHub is not just an organization; it is a revolution born from the grassroots, dedicated to bringing dignity, health, and independence to every woman.
aboutPage.p1: The journey of SakhiHub began in small village meetings, where we noticed a profound gap between available resources and the women who needed them most. Health, hygiene, and financial stability were often treated as luxuries rather than rights.
aboutPage.p2: We realized that true empowerment doesn't come from outside; it comes from within the community. We started by building groups of local women who could support each other, share knowledge, and grow together.
aboutPage.p3: Today, SakhiHub has grown into a powerful network of over 50,000 women, driven by the same spirit of sisterhood and collective progress that sparked our first meeting.
aboutPage.quote: Empowerment is not just about giving a woman a tool; it's about reminding her she has the power to use it.
aboutPage.valTrustDesc: Building long-term relationships with every village community.
aboutPage.valEmpDesc: Focusing on skill-building and long-term independence.
aboutPage.valIncDesc: Leaving no woman behind, regardless of her background.
aboutPage.valImpactDesc: Measuring success through real lives changed, not just numbers.
aboutPage.valSisDesc: Creating a safe space where women support women.
aboutPage.valTransDesc: Full accountability in every program and campaign.
aboutPage.visionDesc: We envision an India where every woman has the resources to look after her health, the education to make her own choices, and the career to stand on her own feet. Our roadmap involves expanding to 100+ districts by 2026, reaching over 1 million women.
aboutPage.visHealthDesc: No woman should suffer due to lack of hygiene knowledge.
aboutPage.visFinDesc: Every SakhiHub member should have a sustainable source of income.
aboutPage.visDigDesc: Connecting rural women with modern digital tools and opportunities.
aboutPage.teamDesc: Our team is composed of passionate social workers, health experts, and community leaders who work 24/7 to ensure SakhiHub's mission reaches the last mile.
aboutPage.joinDesc: Whether as a member, a volunteer, or a partner, your contribution can change a life today.

heroHome.subtitle: SakhiHub is a dedicated platform for women's health, awareness, education, employment, and self-reliance.

heroSlider.slide1Sub: Join our nationwide movement for menstrual hygiene and health awareness.
heroSlider.slide2Sub: Building a network of strong, independent, and confident women across India.
heroSlider.slide3Sub: Become a part of our community and help create sustainable employment for women.
heroSlider.slide4Sub: Specialized camps and educational drives in rural areas for better health.

joinMovement.title: Join the Movement
joinMovement.campDesc: Become a volunteer and help us spread health awareness in your village.
joinMovement.empDesc: Apply for Block Level Employee or District Coordinator roles.
joinMovement.delDesc: Manage product delivery in your Tehsil/Block and earn a steady income.

campaignsHome.sanDesc: Providing essential menstrual hygiene education and kits to rural women.
campaignsHome.healthDesc: Free health checkups and nutritional guidance for women and children.
campaignsHome.memDesc: Expanding our network to empower more women with digital literacy.

galleryPage.title: Visual Journey
galleryPage.subtitle: Capturing the stories of empowerment and change across India.

programsPage.title: Our Programs
programsPage.subtitle: Impactful initiatives driving national transformation at the grassroots level.
programsPage.p1Desc: Dedicated to promoting wellness and menstrual dignity for every woman in rural India through awareness and eco-friendly products.
programsPage.p2Desc: Empowering women to build sustainable careers and achieve financial independence through field work and team leadership roles.
programsPage.p3Desc: Knowledge is the strongest tool for empowerment. We bridge the gap between information and action via digital literacy.
programsPage.p4Desc: Building a powerful sisterhood where every woman supports another through local village groups and support networks.
programsPage.ctaDesc: Join our mission as a Field Hero or Team Lead and help us reach every village in India.

productsPage.subtitle: Sakhi Care: High-quality hygiene solutions at accessible prices.

productsPage.affDesc: Premium hygiene shouldn't be expensive. We keep it reachable.
productsPage.bulkDesc: Partner with us for bulk supplies or distribution opportunities in your region. Let's make quality hygiene products available to every woman.
